ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Explore one of the nutrition books listed below or[ visit a farmer's market ](https://www.usdalocalfoodportal.com/fe/fdirectory_farmersmarket/?source=fe&directory=farmersmarket&location=&x=&y=)near you.
[ ] Write down a scripture, quote, or thought that reminds you why fitness is important to your family. Place it in a spot where you will see it frequently as a family.
[ ] Check out page 133 in the 303 Tween-Approved Exercises and Active Games book for outdoor activities you can do if the weather is warm where you live. The pool exercises are especially family-friendly.
[ ] (Historic Dancing) Gather friends and family and teach them the term's dances.
[ ] Gather friends and family and teach them the term's dances.

[ ] Read the history and try to learn a Regency “[Sir Roger de Coverley](https://www.kickery.com/2008/12/a-regency-sir-roger-de-coverley.html).”
[ ] Read the history and try to learn a Victorian “[Sir Roger de Coverley](https://www.kickery.com/2013/12/victorian-sir-roger.html).”
[ ] Look at a shorter Victorian “[Sir Roger de Coverley](https://www.kickery.com/2019/12/shorter-victorian-sir-roger.html).”

[ ] Make a healthy treat to share with neighbors or take one to the local fire or police station.
[ ] If you are not already certified, consider taking a first aid, CPR, lifeguarding, or babysitting course through the [Red Cross](https://www.redcross.org/take-a-class/cpr)
[ ] Organize a morning or afternoon of activities for younger children to give their parents a break. [This book](https://a.co/d/au799U8) has many ideas. (If you have young children at home, perhaps teen(s) can plan this to give their own parents a break!)
[ ] (Historic Dancing) Gather friends and family and teach them the term's dances.
[ ] Write down a scripture, quote, or thought that reminds you why fitness is important to your family. Place it in a spot where you will see it frequently as a family.
[ ] Check out page 133 in the 303 Tween-Approved Exercises and Active Games book for outdoor activities you can do if the weather is warm where you live. The pool exercises are especially family-friendly.

[ ] View this [Capoeira Performance](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BLug-Odwu04).
[ ] [How Brazilian Capoeira Evolved From a Martial Art to an International Dance Craze](https://www.smithsonianmag.com/smithsonian-institution/capoeira-occult-martial-art-international-dance-180964924/).
[ ] [Capoeira 100: An Illustrated Guide to the Essential Movements and Techniques](https://dn710004.ca.archive.org/0/items/capoeira-100-an-illustrated-guide-to-the-essential-movements-and-techniques/Capoeira%20100%20_%20an%20Illustrated%20Guide%20to%20the%20Essential%20Movements%20and%20Techniques_text.pdf).

[ ] (Historic Dancing) Gather friends and family and teach them the term's dances.
[ ] Write down a scripture, quote, or thought that reminds you why fitness is important to your family. Place it in a spot where you will see it frequently as a family.
[ ] Check out page 133 in the 303 Tween-Approved Exercises and Active Games book for outdoor activities you can do if the weather is warm where you live. The pool exercises are especially family-friendly.

[ ] [The Lancers' Quadrilles](https://archive.org/details/DuvalsLancers/mode/2up): sheet music and dance directions.
[ ] Read the history of [The Lancers' Quadrilles](https://www.regencydances.org/paper007.php).
[ ] [Quadrille and Cotillion history](https://squaredancehistory.org/items/show/1663).
